caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is recorded in a studio setting against a dark gray, ribbed acoustic foam background. He wears large black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a black logo with the text "Stay Humble". A professional silver condenser microphone, mounted on a black boom arm, is positioned close to his mouth. In the initial sequence, the man looks slightly to the left with a neutral expression. As time progresses, he begins to speak, his mouth opening slightly and his gaze shifting. He then looks upward and to the side with a contemplative expression before breaking into a slight smile with his teeth showing. His right arm, which features several tattoos, is partially visible and rests on a surface in front of him throughout the sequence.
